name: chain_small_success_story_with_amazon_kdp_book
method: Small success story with Amazon KDP book (Non-fiction)

stages.task: Playwright-scrape Amazon BSR top 100 in 20 non-fiction categories. Score each by: avg review count <200 (beatable), search volume >1K/mo, price $4.99-9.99 (70% royalty range). Output top 5 opportunities.
Select top niche. Generate 10-chapter outline (30-40K words target), chapter summaries, key points per chapter. Include review gap analysis — what competitors miss.
Generate full manuscript in parallel: 4x claude -p workers each handling 2-3 chapters. Compile, add intro/outro, format to KDP .docx spec (1-inch margins, 11pt Garamond).
Generate: 75-char title, 150-char subtitle, 4000-char description (keyword density 1.5-2%), 7 backend keywords, BISAC category selection, cover image brief (Midjourney prompt).
